translations.The Nextcloud contacts app is a user int:
S'aplicatzione Cuntatos de Nextcloud est un'interfache utente pro su serbidore CardDAV de Nextcloud. Sincroniza is cuntatos in manera simpre dae prus dispositivos cun su Nextcloud tuo e ddos modìficat in lìnia.

* 🚀 **Integrazione cun àteras aplicatziones de Nextcloud!** Immoe Posta e Calendàriu – àteras ant a arribbare.
* 🎉 ***Non t'iscaressas mai de un'anniversàriu!** Podes sincronizare is anniversàrios e is àteros eventos recurrentes cun su calendàriu tuo de Nextcloud.
* 👥 Cumpartzidura de rubricas!** Cheres cumpartzire is cuntatos tuos cun is amigos o is collegas tuos? Perunu problema!
* 🙈 **Non nos semus torrende a imbentare sa roda!** Basada subra de sa libreria de còdighe abertu bella a beru de SabreDAV.
translations.Allow updating avatars from social media: Permite s'agiornamentu de s'avatar dae sas retes sotziales
translations.There was an error fetching the member l: B'at àpidu un'errore in su recùperu de s'elencu de is partetzipantes
translations.There are no contacts in this group: Non ddoe at cuntatos in custu grupu
translations.Update avatars from social media: Agiorna is avatar de is retes sotziales
translations.Create a new contact group: Crea unu grupu de cuntatos nou
translations.Toggling of address book was not success: No at fatu a ativare sa rubrica
translations.This will delete the address book and ev: Custu at a cantzellare sa rubrica e ogni cuntatu chi ddoe est in intro.
translations.Deletion of address book was not success: No at fatu a cantzellare sa rubrica.
translations.Renaming of address book was not success: No at fatu a torrare a numenare sa rubrica.
translations.Unable to delete the share: Non faghet a cantzellare sa cumpartzidura
translations.Unable to change permissions: Non faghet a cambiare is permissos
translations.Importing is disabled because there are: S'importatzione est istada disativada ca non ddoe at rubricas a disponimentu
translations.An error occurred, unable to create the: B'at àpidu un'errore, non faghet a creare sa rubrica
translations.An error happened during the config chan: B'at àpidu un'errore in su càmbiu de cunfigratzione
translations.Avatar downloaded from social network: Avatar iscarrigadu dae sa rete sotziale
translations.Avatar download failed: No at fatu a iscarrigare s'avatar
translations.This contact is in read-only mode. You d: Custu cuntatu est in modalidade de letura sola. Non tenes su permissu pro modificare custu cuntatu.
translations.The contact you were trying to edit has: Su cuntatu chi ses proende a modificare est cambiadu. Pro praghere, agiorna tue etotu su cuntatu. Cale si siat àtera modìfica at a èssere iscartada.
translations.Name: Nùmene
Errore de sintassi. Non si podet abèrrere su cuntatu.
translations.Unable to retrieve the contact from the: Non faghet a recuperare su cuntatu dae su serbidore, controlla s'istadu de sa connessione.
translations.An error occurred while trying to move t: Ddoe at àpidu un'errore proende a tramudare su cuntatu
translations.An error occurred while trying to copy t: Ddoe at àpidu un'errore proende a copiare su cuntatu
translations.Select a contact on the list to begin: Seletziona unu cuntatu in sa lista pro cumintzare
translations.Title: Tìtulu
translations.This contact was broken and received a f: Custu cuntatu fiat dannegiadu e ddoe at àpidu una curretzione. Pro praghere, revisiona su cuntenutu e incarca inoghe pro ddu sarvare.
translations.Contact vCard as QR code: vCard de cuntatu comente còdighe QR
translations.Could not delete the member {displayName: No at fatu a cantzellare su membru {displayName}
translations.Could not change the member level to {le: No at fatu a cambiare su livellu de su membru a {level}
translations.Could not accept membership request: No at fatu a atzetare sa rechesta de partetzipatzione
translations.Some members could not be added: B'at membros chi no si podent agiùnghere
Non faghet a creare su cuntatu.
translations.You are about to leave {circle}.\nAre yo:
Ses acanta de nche essire dae {circle}.
A beru ddu boles lassare?
translations.You are about to delete {circle}.\nAre y:
Ses acanta de cantzellare {circle}.
A beru ddu boles fàghere?
translations.Link copied to the clipboard: Ligòngiu copiadu in punta de billete
No at fatu a copiare su ligòngiu in punta de billete.
translations.Anyone can request membership: Chie si siat podet pedire sa partetzipatzione
translations.Unable to delete contact: Non faghet a cantzellare su cuntatu
